                    Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                    • Post Graduation at SSN: Advancing Knowledge, Shaping Careers

                      SSN’s postgraduate programs are designed to deepen academic expertise, enhance critical thinking, and develop industry-ready professionals. With a strong emphasis on research, innovation, and leadership, SSN equips graduates with the skills needed to excel in their careers and contribute meaningfully to society.



                      Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                      • International Admissions at SSN

                        Join a diverse global community at SSN, where world-class education meets innovation and leadership. Our programs equip you with the skills to excel in your career and make a meaningful impact worldwide.



                        Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                        • Ph.D. at SSN

                          Pursue advanced research at SSN with guidance from expert faculty and state-of-the-art facilities. Our Ph.D. programs foster innovation, critical thinking, and leadership—preparing scholars to drive knowledge and impact globally.



                          Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                          • Lateral Entry at SSN

                            Fast-track your engineering journey by joining SSN through lateral entry. Benefit from advanced learning, industry-focused training, and a vibrant campus life while building the skills to excel in your career.



                            Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                            • Transfer / Lapsed Seats at SSN

                              Continue your academic journey at SSN through transfer or lapsed seat admissions. Gain access to world-class faculty, cutting-edge facilities, and a supportive environment to achieve your career goals.



                              Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                              • Research at SSN

                                SSN fosters a culture of innovation and discovery through cutting-edge research. With expert mentorship and world-class facilities, we empower scholars to create solutions that address real-world challenges.



                                Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                                • MBA Program

                                  MBA at SSN: Shaping Future Business LeadersSSN’s MBA program equips students with strategic thinking, leadership skills and industry-relevant expertise to excel in the corporate world. With a rigorous curriculum, experienced faculty and strong industry connections, the program fosters innovation, entrepreneurship and global business acumen for future leaders.Apply NowMBA Curriculum and SyllabusProgram OutcomesDownload BrochureSign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                                  • Doctoral Program

                                    Doctoral Program at SSN: Advancing Research and ExcellenceSSN’s Doctoral Program is designed for scholars seeking to push the boundaries of knowledge through innovative research and academic excellence. With expert faculty mentorship, cutting-edge resources, and a collaborative research environment, SSN empowers doctoral candidates to make meaningful contributions to their fields and drive societal impact.Apply NowPhD ProgramSign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                                    • MBA at SSN: Shaping Future Business Leaders

                                      SSN’s MBA program equips students with strategic thinking, leadership skills and industry-relevant expertise to excel in the corporate world. With a rigorous curriculum, experienced faculty and strong industry connections, the program fosters innovation, entrepreneurship and global business acumen for future leaders.

                                      Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                                      • Doctoral Program at SSN: Advancing Research and Excellence

                                        SSN’s Doctoral Program is designed for scholars seeking to push the boundaries of knowledge through innovative research and academic excellence. With expert faculty mentorship, cutting-edge resources, and a collaborative research environment, SSN empowers doctoral candidates to make meaningful contributions to their fields and drive societal impact.


                                        Sign Up for Updates & Admissions Info

                                      • SSN Research Centre – Advancing Scientific Excellence

                                        SSN Research Centre embodies Shri Shiv Nadar's vision of fostering innovation in multidisciplinary research. With state-of-the-art laboratories, it focuses on pioneering research in key domains critical to India’s progress.

                                      • SSN School of Advanced Career Education – Bridging Academia and Industry

                                        SSN SACE is dedicated to creating world-class professionals in emerging technologies by aligning education with industry needs. Its programs empower professionals with advanced knowledge and skills to accelerate career growth.

                                      • SSN iFound – Nurturing Innovation & Entrepreneurship

                                        SSN Incubation Foundation (SSN iFound) empowers startups with cutting-edge technology and world-class entrepreneurial practices. It fosters innovation to address critical societal, enterprise, and individual challenges.

                                      SSN Institutions

                                      A Premier Hub for Excellence in Education and Research

                                      SSN Institutions, founded by Shiv Nadar, the visionary Founder and Chairman Emeritus of HCL Technologies, have established themselves as a beacon of excellence in the field of higher education and research. Named after Shiv Nadar’s father, Sri Sivasubramaniya Nadar, these institutions embody a legacy of dedication, innovation and a relentless pursuit of knowledge.

                                      At SSN, the focus is on providing a world-class educational experience, offering a unique blend of undergraduate, postgraduate and research programs. The institution is home to a dynamic and diverse community of students, making it an ideal environment for holistic learning and growth. With accomplished faculty members and cutting-edge facilities, SSN Institutions ensure that students are equipped with the skills and knowledge required to excel in a fast-evolving world.

                                      Innovating with a Strong Research Council

                                      SSN fosters knowledge creation with guidance from its esteemed Research Advisory Council, comprising renowned researchers. This commitment drives innovation and academic excellence.

                                      Empowering Innovation Through Internal Funding

                                      SSN annually funds 200+ student projects with grants averaging ₹25,000 each, totaling ₹2 crore to date, alongside ₹5 crore for faculty research.

                                      Our Placement Partners

                                      Connecting Talent with Top Companies

                                      We take pride in our strong industry connections, partnering with leading companies to ensure exceptional career opportunities for our students. Through dedicated training and mentorship, we bridge the gap between talent and the corporate world. Join us and step into a future filled with possibilities!
